lint.command: echo "ESLint not configured yet — lint is a no-op until ci-enhancement feature adds it"

blockingIssues.description: Confirmed write transactions do not refresh the App read layer because `WritePathSection` has no success callback into App's `refreshKey`, so the market snapshot/recent activity do not update after browser actions and `VAL-CROSS-001` is not satisfied.

Multi-step forms switch the status banner to the next step immediately after approval or wrap confirmation, which hides the confirmed state and Blockscout link for those submitted sub-transactions and leaves `VAL-UI-009` incomplete.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` to document that the committed RainbowKit setup uses the placeholder WalletConnect/Reown project ID `DUALVM_LENDING_HACKATHON`, so injected wallets work but WalletConnect-style options can fail and emit expected 400/403 console noise until a real project ID is supplied.
Updated `.factory/library/environment.md` to record the memory-constrained frontend build workaround `NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' npx vite build` discovered during frontend validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that this repo's existing `npm test` Hardhat suite is part of frontend validation because it covers shared frontend/read-model modules (manifest, read-model loaders, and frontend barrel exports), so frontend-affecting changes should run it unless explicitly out of scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `frontend-wallet-connection` review noted the worker had to explain this nuance manually because the current skill only says `npm test` if frontend tests exist, even though the shared Hardhat suite already covers frontend modules.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen browser write-path validation requirements so workers must verify connected-wallet transaction flows (or a clearly justified limitation), not just disconnected rendering or input acceptance, before marking browser write features complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `frontend-write-forms` review found the worker followed the current skill while only checking the disconnected empty state, which allowed two blocking UX gaps to slip through until scrutiny.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the low-memory Vite build fallback `NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1024' npx vite build` for this machine/environment so frontend workers do not repeatedly rediscover the same OOM failure mode.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `frontend-read-updates` review reported repeated plain `npx vite build` failures and success only after adding the Node memory flag.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared state lacks a note about the placeholder WalletConnect project ID causing expected 400/403 console noise.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of the knowledge observation already applied to `.factory/library/environment.md` from `frontend-wallet-connection`.
